title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at SAP India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at SAP India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? SAP India Capital India in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About SAP India Capital India:
SAP India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAP India Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
